{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323202931C71C5D6EAF6FF0B6D844"}"},"total":55},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618452832798671641","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"家人们谁懂啊 这本书简直是我的电子降压药！💊更新还贼啦快！唯一的缺点就是～太上头了！一看就停不下来，熬夜追更第二天上班都在摸鱼想剧情！强烈推荐给所有被原版四合院气到的朋友，这才是我们想看的四合院，给作者大大打call🎉","text_exts":[{"e":81,"s":78,"text":"四合院","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774268971F0B6D844%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227618452832798671641%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227612282019661237272%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773812034,"group_id":"7612282019661237272","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"女。枣皮红：玉的颜色。作品：曾写过《末世之孽恋情深》等","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nyj+9ST9F19NvJXiJEMPtP0=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/daa0bd8a74c9461da3956ffbaebebaff~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776797081&x-signature=miU2mqxz%2BEM7ZXR1E91d1XpFqiY%3D","user_id":"970216337835735","user_name":"枣皮红"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"970216337835735","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7612282019661237272","book_info":{"abstract":"1959年冬天，张阳穿越到了逃荒者的神色，乡下来的逃荒者，刚到四九城，他看到了一点儿希望，娄晓娥的两个馒头。
可就是因为这俩馒头，让他丧命。
刚到四九城的逃荒者乡下人，最被人瞧不上，往上数三代，谁还不是农民了？
从此，四合院和轧钢厂迎来了他们的至暗时刻！
在厂里跟杨卫国斗，跟李怀德斗，在院里，跟禽兽周旋，你没有根基，没有依靠，人不狠立不住啊","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/be0e363bf02d5f6f070503f147513099","author":"五月五发发","author_id":"","book_id":"7612282019661237272","book_name":"四合院，易容聋老太当街杀王主任","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":495,"name":"四合院","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=495&name=四合院&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7614758809533153817","read_count":"73145","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"129271"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.5","serial_count":"58","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,四合院,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c76aa6a280b22dddbba3d59b89d8f961~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779452971&x-signature=%2BAzeiNno9n7Xqr0aQMgfXi2xOzg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"184329423302744","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"73"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323202931C71C5D6EAF6FF0B6D844"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":
